case_title: KING,BAILEY VS HONGISTO,RICHARD CHIEF EXEC.OFFICER PHOENIX OPER. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KING,BAILEY AS TO DEFENDANT HONGISTO,RICHARD CHIEF EXEC.OFFICER PHOENIX OPER. PHOENIX OPERATIONS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO RICHARD HONGISTO RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING,BAILEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOENIX OPERATIONS INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HONGISTO,RICHARD CHIEF EXEC.OFFICER PHOENIX OPER. HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-13-1993, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING,BAILEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHOENIX OPERATIONS INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, JUDGMENT AGAINST RICHARD HONGISTO IND IS REVERSED. ACTION AGAINST R HONGISTO DISMISSED IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PHOENIX OPERATIONS INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22921, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING,BAILEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HONGISTO,RICHARD CHIEF EXEC.OFFICER PHOENIX OPER. PHOENIX OPERATIONS INC. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 22921 ON 6-30-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
